properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
We share the same passion: Padel! 1Padel was launched in 2022 with the aim of revolutionising the Padel industry in Malta.
Don't have a partner? Join us in our Whatsapp Group here and find friends to play: https://chat.whatsapp.com/Grt5VlRHe6g9sYZ6OrTvwL

address.street: Triq Dun Michele Balzan, Ħ'Attard, Malta
Triq L-Imhallef William Harding, Pembroke, PBK 1532, Malta

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Padel Malta hosts 3 brand new Padel courts in the heart of Pembroke. We offer racket rentals, coaching, a bar/restaurant and much much more.

For more info and to book coaching sessions, contact us on info@padel.mt or call / whatsapp +356 79988987

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Padel Malta Birkirkara is offering 2 panoramic courts in a great sporty setting of the Mediterranean College of Sport. Coaching, rental rackets, purchase of balls, drinks, and much more available!

description: Padel Malta Birkirkara is offering 2 panoramic courts in a great sporty setting of the Mediterranean College of Sport. Coaching, rental rackets, purchase of balls, drinks, and much more available!

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
At our new location in the south of Malta, we offer a premium padel experience featuring:
One outdoor single padel court, ideal for one-on-one games and training sessions.
One outdoor double padel court, perfect for competitive or social doubles matches.
Free parking available.
Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned player, our facilities are designed to offer a fun, accessible, and professional environment. The new venue's southern location ensures easy access and a relaxed atmosphere, making it a great spot for both regular play and casual visits.

description: At our new location in the south of Malta, we offer a premium padel experience featuring: One outdoor single padel court, ideal for one-on-one games and training sessions. One outdoor double padel court, perfect for competitive or social doubles matches. Free parking available. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned player, our facilities are designed to offer a fun, accessible, and professional environment. The new venue's southern location ensures easy access and a relaxed atmosphere, making it a great spot for both regular play and casual visits.
Multi-sport club with tennis, padel and squash courts in Marsa.
Two outdoor pickleball courts at Gharghur FC.
Community tennis and pickleball club in Mġarr.
